summary: See if you're on a good version of the mobile app and optionally get a message to be shown to the user
description: See if you're on a good version of the mobile app and optionally get a message to be shown to the user. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/mobile_app/version_check. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include locale, app_version, platform.
example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/mobile_app/version_check

Required params: company_id

Optional params: locale, app_version, platform

message.title: Update required
message.body_html: Please update the Recruitee app to the latest version.
